comment: I wish when you go through your photos and place them to the different albums that that's the only place you would see them. It's impossible to sort all of my pics because I don't know where I left off. I'll have to start over again and again. It's too much work.... Other than that, its got pretty good features like facial recognition and putting each person in their own album etc. I will try to update after I see how this current update works. I need to spend every minute sorting all of my pic
the function of activity: Search: Find contacts. Menu: Access options. Cast: Connect to casting devices. Favorite: Mark as preferred. Share: Distribute content. Edit: Modify content. Lens: Activate camera.
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'Remove from album', 'description': 'Remove a photo from the current album'}, {'name': 'Use as album cover', 'description': 'Set the selected photo as the cover image for the current album'}, {'name': 'Add to album', 'description': 'Add the selected photo to an album'}, {'name': 'Move to Archive', 'description': 'Move the selected photo to the Archive'}, {'name': 'Create', 'description': 'Create a new album or collection'}, {'name': 'Edit date/time', 'description': 'Modify the date and time of the selected media'}, {'name': 'Add a caption', 'description': 'Add a caption to the selected media'}, {'name': 'Details', 'description': 'View detailed information about the selected media'}, {'name': 'Storage information', 'description': 'View information about the storage location and size of the selected media'}, {'name': 'Backup options', 'description': 'Access options for backing up the selected media'}, {'name': 'Close Info', 'description': 'Close the information panel'}]

operations.event: click<button id=27 class ="com.google.android.apps.photos:id/photos_pager_menu_add_to_album"> Add to album,  </button>
